name: React Routing
description: Routing options for React apps — from drop-in routing libraries to full meta-frameworks — compared across paradigm, type safety, data loading, rendering, and maturity

groups.name: General Info
groups.description: Basic information about the routing library or framework

attributes.name: Name
attributes.description: Official name

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: One-line value proposition

attributes.name: Website
attributes.description: Official docs or homepage

attributes.name: Repository
attributes.description: GitHub/GitLab repository URL

attributes.name: License
attributes.description: SPDX identifier (MIT, Apache-2.0, etc.)

attributes.name: Category
attributes.description: Kind of thing it is: a drop-in router or a full framework

attributes.name: Active Maintenance
attributes.description: Commits/releases within the last ~6 months

attributes.name: Initial Release
attributes.description: Year of first public release

attributes.name: Latest Release
attributes.description: Date of most recent stable release

attributes.name: GitHub Stars
attributes.description: Current star count; higher is more popular

attributes.name: npm Weekly Downloads
attributes.description: Weekly downloads of the primary package

groups.name: Routing Model
groups.description: How routes are declared and navigated

attributes.name: Routing Paradigm
attributes.description: How routes are declared; multiple may apply

attributes.name: Nested / Layout Routes
attributes.description: Supports nested routes with shared parent layouts

attributes.name: Dynamic Params
attributes.description: Path params like /users/:id

attributes.name: Optional / Catch-All Params
attributes.description: Optional segments and splat/wildcard routes

attributes.name: Search Params API
attributes.description: First-class API for query string state beyond raw URLSearchParams

attributes.name: Programmatic Navigation
attributes.description: Imperative navigation via a hook or function

attributes.name: Route Guards / Middleware
attributes.description: Built-in per-route guards, middleware, or beforeLoad-style hooks

groups.name: Type Safety
groups.description: How well routes, params, and search params are typed

attributes.name: Written in TypeScript
attributes.description: Ships first-class type definitions authored in TS

attributes.name: Type-Safe Paths / Links
attributes.description: Link/navigate calls are checked against known routes

attributes.name: Type-Safe Params
attributes.description: Path params inferred with correct types at usage sites

attributes.name: Type-Safe Search Params
attributes.description: Query/search params typed and validated

attributes.name: Codegen Required
attributes.description: Requires a generation/build step to produce route types (vs. pure inference)

attributes.name: Type Safety Rating
attributes.description: Overall end-to-end type safety; see Assessment Guidelines

attributes.name: Route Data Loaders
attributes.description: Route-level data loading before render (loader / useLoaderData-style)

attributes.name: Actions / Mutations
attributes.description: Built-in write/mutation primitive tied to routes

attributes.name: Prefetching
attributes.description: Prefetch route code and/or data on hover/intent

attributes.name: Pending / Transition UI
attributes.description: Built-in pending states or React transition integration during navigation

attributes.name: Scroll Restoration
attributes.description: Restores scroll position across navigations

attributes.name: Per-Route Code Splitting
attributes.description: Lazy-load route components/bundles per route

attributes.name: Per-Route Error Handling
attributes.description: Route-scoped error boundaries / error elements

groups.name: Rendering & SSR
groups.description: Server rendering, streaming, and RSC capabilities

attributes.name: SSR Support
attributes.description: Server-side rendering supported (built-in or documented)

attributes.name: Streaming SSR
attributes.description: Supports streaming/suspenseful SSR

attributes.name: React Server Components
attributes.description: First-class RSC support

attributes.name: Static Site Generation
attributes.description: Can pre-render routes to static HTML

attributes.name: Client-Only Usable
attributes.description: Can run as a pure CSR SPA router with no server

attributes.name: Framework-Bound
attributes.description: Requires its own build/framework toolchain rather than dropping into any React app

attributes.name: Bundle Size
attributes.description: Router core, minified + gzipped; null for meta-frameworks

attributes.name: Zero Runtime Dependencies
attributes.description: Ships with no (or effectively no) third-party runtime deps

attributes.name: Tree Shakeable
attributes.description: Supports dead-code elimination

attributes.name: Documentation Quality
attributes.description: See Assessment Guidelines

attributes.name: Official Devtools
attributes.description: Dedicated devtools/inspector for routes and navigation

attributes.name: Data-Fetching Integration
attributes.description: Documented/first-class data-fetching integrations

attributes.name: Predecessor / Lineage
attributes.description: Where it came from; null if none
